title: Fire And Special Perils
definition: The basic cover responds to loss or damage to property caused by fire, lightning, and explosion and is extended to include riots, strikes, malicious damages, storms, earthquakes, floods, and water damages due to bursting or overflowing water tanks apparatus and pipes. Property covered includes: buildings, furniture, fixtures and fittings, plant and machinery etc. Who is this for? It's suitable for anybody who owns physical property in a fixed location.
benefits: Fire, lightning, explosion and additional perils extension Earthquake, volcanic eruption and subterranean fire, bush fire Storm, wind, water hail or snow Aircraft, other aerial devices or articles dropped therefrom. Impact by animals, train, trees or vehicles excluding damage to such vehicles Leakage or discharge from fire extinguishing installations/appliance like a sprinkler system Subsidence and land-slip Riot, strike, civil commotion, and malicious damage Spontaneous combustion, fermentation, self-heating Political Violence and Terrorism Insurance
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
